title: Ensemble Learning Methods
description: A flowchart illustrating the main types of ensemble learning methods and their relationships, showing how multiple models are combined to improve predictive performance.
relationships: Training Data is used to create multiple Base Learners
Bagging trains learners in parallel on random subsets
Boosting trains learners sequentially, focusing on errors
Stacking combines predictions using a meta-learner
All methods converge to a Final Prediction
